description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile sports car with a streamlined body and aggressive aerodynamic features. The exterior is predominantly matte black, with large, tinted windows and a prominent rear wing spoiler for enhanced downforce. The front end features wide air intakes and sharp, angular headlights, while the rear showcases a diffuser and dual exhausts. The side profile reveals sculpted doors, flush handles, and large, blacked-out wheels with a multi-spoke design. The car sits very close to the ground, emphasizing its high-performance nature. The overall design suggests a focus on speed, handling, and modern aesthetics, typical of high-end supercars.
description: A matte black, low-slung sports car with a large rear wing, sculpted bodywork, and black multi-spoke wheels. Its aggressive styling and aerodynamic features highlight its high-performance intent.
description_view_0: Front view showing wide air intakes, angular headlights, and the low, wide stance of the car.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sculpted doors, flush handles, and the prominent rear wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large diffuser, dual exhausts, and the full width of the rear wing.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the aerodynamic lines and black wheels.
